depthPolicy.comment: If >= knownThreshold bits in a category are marked 'already knew', the agent must raise that category's baseline depth and stop generating 'core'-depth bits for it.

learner.name: Amit
learner.profile: Bangalore-based right-handed amateur, ~110 shooter, building toward an IGU/WHS handicap and BMW Golf Cup Category B. Plays Clover Greens, afternoons Wed-Sun.
